# services.rqbit

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rqbit`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rqbit.downloadDir` | `absolute path` | Directory where to download torrents. |
| `services.rqbit.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rqbit BitTorrent daemon. |
| `services.rqbit.group` | `string` | Group account under which rqbit runs. |
| `services.rqbit.httpHost` | `string` | The listen host for the HTTP API. |
| `services.rqbit.httpPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The listen port for the HTTP API. |
| `services.rqbit.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opening of the HTTP and Peer ports in the firewall. |
| `services.rqbit.package` | `package` | The rqbit package to use. |
| `services.rqbit.peerPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen for incoming BitTorrent peer connections (TCP and uTP). |
| `services.rqbit.user` | `string` | User account under which rqbit runs. |
